response.overview: This short documentary flim was shooted in January 2026. It showcases the latest experiences in Xizang, China, of nine youth from six countries across four continents: Nepal, the United States, Russia, Italy, Morocco, and Cambodia. The film highlights the nine young people's visits to cultural heritage preservation sites like the Potala Palace and Jokhang Temple, the development of photovoltaic power stations and green new energy, modern residential architecture and agriculture, ecological conservation efforts for snow-capped mountains, glaciers, and plateau lakes, high-speed rail and expressways, the transmission of intangible cultural heritage, and the ordinary yet fulfilling modern lives of everyday people.
response.title: Discovering Xizang 2026
